'''V-Tarz''' was a gruff [[Truant Guide]] at the [[Learning Circle]] on [[Kegan/Legends|Kegan]]. He apprehended [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Siri Tachi/Legends|Siri Tachi]] during a truant sweep, mistakenly thinking they were students escaping from the Learning Circle.

{{Char-stub}}
